requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs SAE J1772 / CCS1
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与SAE J1772 / CCS1
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與SAE J1772 / CCS1

summary.en: The Palau is a 60 Hz Americas-market environment with US-heritage electrical infrastructure. The practical EV connector baseline is SAE J1772 for AC charging and CCS1 for DC fast charging. Exporters should use J1772 / CCS1 as the Palau starting point and confirm the exact connector specification with the site owner, PPUC, charge-point operator, vehicle fleet, or tender documents before production. GB/T connectors are physically incompatible with this connector ecosystem.
summary.zh: 巴劳属于60 Hz美洲市场环境，电气基础设施具有美国体系特征。实务上的电动汽车接口基线为交流SAE J1772和直流快充CCS1。出口商应以J1772 / CCS1作为巴劳方案起点，并在生产前向场地方、PPUC、充电点运营商、车辆车队或招标文件确认具体接口规格。GB/T接口与该接口生态在物理上不兼容。
summary.zht: 巴勞屬於60 Hz美洲市場環境，電氣基礎設施具有美國體系特徵。實務上的電動汽車接口基線為交流SAE J1772和直流快充CCS1。出口商應以J1772 / CCS1作為巴勞方案起點，並在生產前向場地方、PPUC、充電點運營商、車輛車隊或招標文件確認具體接口規格。GB/T接口與該接口生態在物理上不兼容。

standards_or_laws: SAE J1772 — EV and plug-in hybrid conductive charge coupler for AC charging
CCS Combo 1 / CCS1 — DC fast-charging connector used in the Americas market
UL 2251 — plugs, receptacles, and couplers for electric vehicles where specified
Project, utility, fleet, or charge-point-operator connector specifications

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and China DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers with GB/T 27930 communication. These connectors do not mate with SAE J1772 vehicle inlets or CCS1 inlets. DC conversion also changes the communication stack, locking, cable assembly, thermal-rise evidence, labels, and service parts.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，中国直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器并配套GB/T 27930通信。这些接口无法与SAE J1772车辆接口或CCS1车辆接口插合。直流转换还会改变通信栈、锁止机构、电缆组件、温升证据、标签和维修备件。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，中國直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器並配套GB/T 27930通訊。這些接口無法與SAE J1772車輛接口或CCS1車輛接口插合。直流轉換還會改變通訊棧、鎖止機構、電纜組件、溫升證據、標籤和維修備件。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — DC charger to battery management system communication

gap.en: A China GB/T-only charger is not connector-ready for the Palau. Conversion requires hardware redesign to SAE J1772 for AC and CCS1 for DC, including coupler, cable assembly, locking, proximity and control-pilot behavior, DC communication, cable cooling where used, thermal-rise tests, markings, manuals, and spare parts. Adapters should not be treated as a compliance substitute for project-specified connector hardware.
gap.zh: 仅支持中国GB/T接口的充电桩不具备巴劳接口就绪性。转换需要按交流SAE J1772和直流CCS1进行硬件重新设计，包括耦合器、电缆组件、锁止、接近导引和控制导引行为、直流通信、适用时的电缆冷却、温升测试、标识、说明书和备件。转接器不应被视为项目指定接口硬件的合规替代。
gap.zht: 僅支持中國GB/T接口的充電樁不具備巴勞接口就緒性。轉換需要按交流SAE J1772和直流CCS1進行硬體重新設計，包括耦合器、電纜組件、鎖止、接近導引和控制導引行為、直流通訊、適用時的電纜冷卻、溫升測試、標識、說明書和備件。轉接器不應被視為項目指定接口硬體的合規替代。

mandatory_status.target: Project-critical — SAE J1772 / CCS1 are the practical connector baseline for this 60 Hz Americas market; exact connector requirements must be confirmed in the project, fleet, utility, or CPO specification
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 applies to China domestic connector design and is not a physical substitute for SAE J1772 / CCS1

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connector conversion is a hardware and protocol redesign. For the Palau, design around SAE J1772 for AC and CCS1 for DC unless the project authority specifies otherwise. GB/T connectors cannot plug into J1772 or CCS1 vehicle inlets.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 接口转换是硬件和协议重新设计。面向巴劳时，除非项目主管方另有规定，应围绕交流SAE J1772和直流CCS1设计。GB/T接口无法插入J1772或CCS1车辆接口。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 接口轉換是硬體和協議重新設計。面向巴勞時，除非項目主管方另有規定，應圍繞交流SAE J1772和直流CCS1設計。GB/T接口無法插入J1772或CCS1車輛接口。
